## Summary

-

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill (add `feat(skills): add /<name>`)
- [ ] Improvement to an existing skill
- [ ] Validator / tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/validate-skills.sh` passes locally
- [ ] If adding a skill: row added to [`registry.md`](../registry.md)
- [ ] If changing behavior: entry added under `[Unreleased]` in [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md)
- [ ] If renaming a skill: every cross-reference updated, minor version noted in CHANGELOG
- [ ] Self-reviewed via the `/review-mr` checklist

## Breaking change?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes — explain impact and migration steps below
